# =========================================================================
# snare-rim — unpitched one-shots. ~200 prompts.
# Style mix (generated lines): ~64% EDM/electronic. EDM-forward, full spectrum.
# Generated by gen_prompts.py (deterministic). Curated lines preserved on top.
# =========================================================================
